summary: Iteration 18 - Bug Fixes Testing. Tested: 1) Company Admin tickets sync from vendeurs (lottery_transactions), 2) Succursale Modifier/Suspendre buttons, 3) Super Admin Global Schedules page. Found 1 bug: SuperGlobalSchedulesPage.js calls /api/saas/lottery-catalog which returns 404 (should be /api/saas/master-lotteries).

ui_bugs.issue: Frontend calls /api/saas/lottery-catalog which returns 404. Should be /api/saas/master-lotteries

action_items: FIX SuperGlobalSchedulesPage.js: Change line 48 from '/api/saas/lottery-catalog' to '/api/saas/master-lotteries'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 bug fixes verified. Company tickets sync working - 14 tickets visible with statuses. Succursale Edit/Suspend/Activate buttons all functional. Global Schedules page loads but lottery dropdown fails due to wrong API endpoint call.

company_tickets_sync.details: Now correctly queries lottery_transactions collection. 14 tickets visible with WINNER/LOSER/PENDING_RESULT statuses.

succursale_edit.details: Edit modal opens, fields populate correctly, update saves successfully

global_schedules_page.details: Page loads, table displays, but lottery dropdown fails because frontend calls wrong endpoint (/api/saas/lottery-catalog instead of /api/saas/master-lotteries)

vendeur_suspended_check.details: Vendeur jean@gmail.com can login when succursale is active
